subject: feat(sancio): add missing validation fields, new endpoints, and unscoped GETs
body:
Frontend (sun-sea-o) has migrated from direct Supabase to the REST API.
This implements the remaining gaps so affected features stop failing at runtime.

1. Validation gaps (existing endpoints):
   - validateModuleUpdate: add intent, summary_does, summary_when, summary_consequence
   - validateNoteInput: add sender_tone
   - validateProposalInput: add sender_tone

2. New endpoints:
   - POST /projects/:id/accept-handshake — counterparty handshake acceptance
   - POST /modules/:id/move — move module up/down (swap positions)
   - POST /modules/batch-ready — batch toggle ready-to-sign

3. Unscoped GET endpoints (optional parent ID params):
   - GET /agreements — optional projectId
   - GET /modules — optional agreementId
   - GET /notes — optional agreementId
   - GET /proposals — optional moduleId
   - GET /pdf-verifications — optional agreementId/code

17 new validation tests added. All 89 tests pass. Typecheck clean.

Tags: api, sancio, validation, endpoints
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: sancio-api-migration
Semver: minor
